author: y4rr
content:
Pass 5.A.2 closed APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS.

Source-doc reassessment caught 5 of 8 audit-cited STUBs as stale (already-correct fail-fast). Real fixes: 3 sites in lib.rs (MpsDevice::new, MpsDevice::count, mps_device_count) wired to is_mps_available()-conditional Metal discovery on cfg(target_os="macos"); Linux/non-Apple contract preserved bit-for-bit.

Test changes:
- 3 lib.rs::tests fns split into _non_macos_* + _macos_* siblings
- 3 conformance_mps.rs fixture tests cascade_skip-conditioned for macOS-vs-Linux-fixture divergence
- 4 new lib.rs::tests + 3 new conformance tests (cfg-gated to macOS)

Verification: cargo test 5/5 lib + 27/27 conformance + 1/1 surface; cargo build clean; clippy -D warnings clean; cargo check --target x86_64-apple-darwin failed environmentally (core-math-sys requires Apple SDK on Linux). macOS runtime sabotage capture deferred to Apple Silicon CI (#1131).

Stale-no-op acknowledgements (NOT modified):
- backend.rs:494-497 (neg_f32) — follow-up #626
- backend.rs:791-794 (gelu_f32) — follow-up #626
- backend.rs:797-806 (dropout_f32) — follow-up #626
- lib.rs:201-210 (init_mps_backend non-macOS) — by-design

Follow-ups: #1131 (Apple Silicon CI runner).
